about.label: OUR STORY
about.title:
Established on Craft,
Built on Experience
paragraphs: Founded in 2018 in Cainta, Rizal, Madrid Commercial Press was born from a vision to elevate the standards of commercial printing in the Philippines.
Built on Mr. Madrid's three decades of industry mastery, we transform ideas from concept to tangible reality — one impression at a time.

items.title: Rapid Turnaround
items.description: Streamlined processes ensuring your deadlines are met without compromising quality.

items.title: Uncompromising Quality
items.description: Rigorous multi-stage quality control checks from pre-press to final delivery.

items.title: Technical Expertise
items.description: Decades of combined experience navigating complex printing challenges and materials.

items.title: Absolute Reliability
items.description: A proven track record of consistency for multinational brands and local enterprises.

products.label: OUR PRODUCTS
products.title: The Masterpieces We Create
products.subtitle: From concept to creation, we bring your vision to life across every format.

items.name: Product Packaging
items.description: Custom boxes and containers designed to protect and showcase your products.

items.name: Sleeves & Wrappers
items.description: Precision-printed sleeves and wrappers for pharmaceutical and consumer goods.

items.name: Corrugated Boxes
items.description: Durable packaging solutions for shipping and retail display.

items.name: Hardcover Books
items.description: Premium hardbound publications with archival-quality printing.

items.name: Softcover & Paperbacks
items.description: Cost-effective softcover printing for novels, manuals, and guides.

items.name: Journals & Notebooks
items.description: Custom journals with specialty covers and lay-flat binding.

items.name: Brochures & Flyers
items.description: High-impact marketing collateral with vivid color reproduction.

items.name: Business Cards
items.description: Premium cards with options for embossing, foil, and specialty finishes.

items.name: Catalogs & Magazines
items.description: Multi-page publications with perfect binding and saddle-stitch options.

items.name: Foil Stamping
items.description: Metallic and holographic foil applications for luxury finishing.

items.name: Embossing & Debossing
items.description: Tactile raised or recessed designs that add dimension to print.

items.name: 3D Lamination
items.description: Eye-catching lenticular and textured lamination effects.

processTimeline.label: OUR PROCESS
processTimeline.title: Streamlined Execution
processTimeline.subtitle: A transparent, milestone-driven approach to ensure quality from the first draft to the final delivery.

items.title: Consultation & Quotation
items.description: We understand your project requirements, material preferences, and timelines to provide an accurate, competitive quote.

items.title: Pre-Press & Proofing
items.description: Our pre-press technicians prepare your artwork, perform color corrections, and provide digital or physical proofs for your approval.

items.title: Production & Quality Check
items.description: Your project hits the press. We conduct rigorous color matching and structural integrity checks during the entire run.

items.title: Post-Press Finishing
items.description: We apply the final touches — laminating, die-cutting, embossing, and binding — to elevate the printed piece.

items.title: Delivery & Logistics
items.description: Carefully packaged and quality-assured, the final products are delivered safely to your specified location.

items.name: Alman Madrid
items.brief: With over 30 years of printing industry expertise, Alman Madrid founded MCP with a vision to deliver world-class commercial printing to Philippine businesses.

items.name: Kate Madrid
items.brief: Kate ensures every project flows seamlessly from order to delivery, maintaining the highest standards of quality and operational excellence.

partners.label: TRUSTED BY
partners.title: Our Network
partners.subtitle: We partner with leading suppliers and brands to deliver uncompromising quality.
